title: Price Lists Search Data
description: List of **Products** and **Industry Process Experiences (IPE)** that the authorized user is accredited to sell.

items.description: Summary information for a price list query.

A predefined set of product prices applicable to a specific country and currency.
Each price list defines how products are priced within a particular market or region
and serves as a reference for calculating order amounts.

hasFuturePriceList.description:
Indicates whether a future version of the price list has been declared.
- true: A future-dated price list exists.
- false: No future price list has been declared.

effectiveDate.description:
The date when the future price list takes effect.
If 'null', it indicates that no future price list version has been declared.
